_note: CK detachment modifiers — game mechanics only. Engine loads this for DPP/SURV/MOB computation. All data verified from 40k.app (official 11e database) or Goonhammer faction pack review.

choices.name: Annihilate the Unworthy
choices.description: +1 to hit rolls vs battle-shocked units (modelled as always-on)
choices._engine_note: Conditional on target being battle-shocked. Modelled as always-on for DPP estimation. GH article notes this is hard to trigger reliably.

HUNTING WARPACK._engine_note: Detachment rule (Scenting Fear): Once/BR, pick unit visible within 12" of a War Dog, +6" detection range. No direct DPP/SURV/MOB modifier. Recon disposition — bad for CK.

choices.name: Snarling Rivalry
choices.condition: upgrade enhancement for Executioners — Ignores Cover
choices.description: Executioners gain Ignores Cover from upgrade enhancement. Targeting qualifier, not a stat modifier.
choices._engine_note: Ignores Cover cannot be expressed as a numeric modifier. Listed for reference only. GH rates as excellent for Executioners.

choices.name: Insensate Bloodthirst
choices.condition: 1CP stratagem — 5+ Feel No Pain in Fight phase
choices.description: 1CP strat giving War Dogs 5+ FNP in the Fight phase. Not always-on.
choices._engine_note: 1CP stratagem, not always-on. GH rates as amazing for Karnivores.

ICONOCLAST FIEFDOM._engine_note: Detachment rule (Wretched Thralls): include DAMNED units up to 500pts, reroll LD for DAMNED. List-building flexibility — no DPP/SURV/MOB modifier. Take and Hold disposition.

choices.name: Wretched Thralls
choices.condition: allows up to 500pts of DAMNED units in army
choices.description: Include DAMNED units (Cultists, Accursed Cultists, Traitor Guard, Dark Communes) up to 500pts. Enables objective play and actions via cheap bodies.
choices._engine_note: List-building rule, not a DPP/SURV/MOB modifier. Iconoclast is the most impactful 1DP detachment for CK because it fixes the faction's biggest weakness (low model count, can't do actions/objectives).

HELHUNT LANCE._engine_note: Detachment rule (Masters of the Pack): TITANIC Knight with aura affecting War Dogs gets self-aura when 2+ War Dogs in range. Situational — only benefits Desecrator (reroll 1s), Ruinator (+1AP). Contemptuous Volleys strat gives fallback+shoot/charge for 1CP. GH article (10e) rated as faction's worst.

choices.name: Masters of the Pack
choices.condition: TITANIC Knight gains own auras when 2+ War Dogs within 6"
choices.description: Aura self-affection — depends on specific auras carried by the Knight. Cannot be modelled as a universal DPP modifier.
choices._engine_note: No engine-applied modifier. Only impactful for Desecrator (reroll 1s to hit) or Ruinator (+1AP). Abominant, Lancer, Tyrant get minimal benefit.

choices.name: Contemptuous Volleys
choices.condition: 1CP stratagem: after Fall Back, can shoot and charge
choices.description: 1CP strat: unit can shoot and declare a charge in a turn it Fell Back.
choices._engine_note: 1CP stratagem, not always-on. Listed for reference.

HOUNDPACK LANCE._engine_note: Detachment rule (Marked Prey): start of Command phase, pick one enemy unit → all War Dogs get Sustained Hits 1 vs it until next Command phase. Must include 3+ War Dog units. War Dogs are BATTLELINE. Pick 3 War Dogs as CHARACTERS for Enhancements. Recon disposition.

choices.name: Marked Prey
choices.condition: select one enemy unit per Command phase; all War Dogs gain Sustained Hits 1 vs it until next Command phase
choices.description: War Dogs gain Sustained Hits 1 against a single marked prey each turn. Modelled as always-on for DPP estimation.
choices._engine_note: Single-target per turn — modelled as always-on for DPP estimation. In practice, you can re-target each turn. Excellent War Dog detachment with strong stratagem support (reactive 6" move, fight on death, crit on 5+).

LORDS OF DREAD._engine_note: Detachment rule (Tyrannical Court): CHAOS KNIGHTS CHARACTER models get +2 OC. Once/BR, if Warlord on battlefield, use Claimed for the Dark Gods strat for 0CP (sticky objective with OC5). Priority Assets disposition. GH 11e review: 'still kinda bad.'

choices.name: Tyrannical Court
choices.condition: +2 OC for CHARACTER models; 0CP sticky objective once/round
choices.description: +2 Objective Control for CHARACTER models and free sticky objective strat once per round.
choices._engine_note: OC bonus and free strat use. No direct DPP/SURV modifier. +2 OC helps with objective control but engine doesn't model OC directly.

TRAITORIS LANCE._engine_note: Detachment rule (Paragons of Terror): At start of first battle round, after selecting Dread abilities, select one additional Dread ability to be active. Effectively have 2 Dread abilities active instead of 1. Dread abilities include: Despair (-1 Ld), Doom (+1 to wound vs battle-shocked), Darkness (Stealth), Dismay (extra battleshock tests), Delirium (mortals on failed shock), Dominion (+3" aura). NOT Sustained Hits or Lethal Hits — PREVIOUSLY FABRICATED. Purge the Foe disposition.

choices.name: Paragons of Terror
choices.condition: one additional Dread ability active for the army; Doom gives +1 to wound vs battle-shocked, but requires opponent to be battle-shocked
choices.description: Extra Dread ability at start of game. Meta pick: Doom (+1 to wound vs battle-shocked) + Darkness (Stealth) or Dismay (battleshock tests). Conditional damage buff dependent on battle-shock.
choices._engine_note: No universal DPP modifier. The damage buff (Doom: +1 to wound vs battle-shocked) is conditional on opponent failing battleshock. GH notes 'the ruleset there leaves a lot to be desired.' Purge disposition is the main draw.

INFERNAL LANCE._engine_note: Detachment rule (Malefic Surge): In Command phase, pick CHAOS KNIGHTS units to take LD test. Fail = D3 mortals, but unit becomes Empowered. Use one Malefic Surge ability per unit per round: Unholy Hunger (+3" move), Diabolic Power (Lethal Hits or Sustained Hits 1), Unnatural Fortitude (5++ or 6+++). Purge the Foe disposition. High risk/reward.

choices.name: Diabolic Power
choices.condition: Empowered only: select Lethal Hits OR Sustained Hits 1 for the phase when shooting/fighting. Risk: D3 mortals on failed LD test.
choices.description: Choose Lethal Hits or Sustained Hits 1 for a unit for one activation. Modelled as both for estimation but actual rule is pick one per activation.
choices._engine_note: One-use per unit per round, requires Empowered (LD test + possible D3 mortals). Modelled as always-on for DPP estimation but actual use is once per round per unit.

choices.name: Unholy Hunger
choices.condition: Empowered only: +3" to Move characteristic when making Normal/Advance/Fall Back move for the phase
choices.description: +3" movement for one activation when Empowered.
choices._engine_note: One-use per unit per round, requires Empowered.

choices.name: Unnatural Fortitude
choices.condition: Empowered only: when targeted by attacks, gain 5++ invuln OR 6+++ FNP for the phase
choices.description: 5+ invuln or 6+ FNP for one activation when Empowered. Modelled as both active but actual rule is pick one.
choices._engine_note: One-use per unit per round, requires Empowered.
